title: Zeuxine lancifolia
taxonomy: Zeuxine lancifolia is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Zeuxine, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. Zeuxine lancifolia is further classified as a member of the tribe Cranichideae, which includes several species of orchids. The classification of Zeuxine lancifolia is also based on its morphological characteristics and geographical distribution. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and diversity within the plant kingdom.

intro: Zeuxine lancifolia is a species of orchid, specifically a type of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antihelmintic, and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections.
